message:
fix(connectors): Trello credential leak, path sanitization, ClickUp shutdown

Security: Trello build_url() was embedding api_key and token directly
in the URL string, which then got logged via debug!(url = %url). Changed
to use reqwest .query() so credentials never appear in the URL or logs.

Security: Added sanitize_path_segment() to both Trello and ClickUp
clients to prevent path traversal attacks on user-supplied IDs, matching
the existing pattern in Confluence and Monday connectors.

Correctness: ClickUp handle_shutdown() was dropping the client Arc
without calling client.shutdown() first, leaking the ConnectorRuntime.
Added the shutdown call to match Trello and Dropbox patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
